claim_scope: exact fixed-form charge bouncer identity and bounded complete transition families, replayed through charge and original unit macros; no infinite accepted orbit is claimed
conditional_disproof: an infinite accepted positive bouncer orbit compiles to an infinite strictly outward ordinary Collatz macro-orbit
partial_map: m=v2(y+1)/23; E=3^(17*m)*(y+1)-2^(23*m); h=(v2(E)-23*m)/154; y'=3^(114*h)*oddpart(E); accept positive integral m,h and another defect phase
